content:
# Session 24 (iter-024) — review

## Metadata
- Prover lanes: 1 (opus) — FBC `Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean`. SNAP was a plan-phase REFACTOR lane
  (`fbc-geom-reorder` + `snap-deprivate`), NOT a prover lane.
- Sorry-bearing decls (review-verified firsthand by cold `lake build`): **FBC 4** (glue @L1980 +
  3 dead-mate/seed @L2330/L2605/L2645... actually @2330/2605/2645 per build) ; **SNAP 5** (@919/1894/1917/1938/1997).
- Net frontier sorry elimination: **0**. No new sorry-free decls landed (the prover's natTrans attempt
  is a commented-out, non-compiled block).
- Cold-build status (firsthand): **FBC GREEN** (exit 0, 8318 jobs), **SNAP GREEN** (exit 0, 2442 jobs).
  iter-023 SNAP regression is FIXED (de-privatized in plan phase). 0 axioms. blueprint-doctor: 0 findings.
  sync_leanok iter-24 sha b065ada (+46 markers, FBC+SNAP coverage docs).

## FBC — glue route confirmed GENUINELY STUCK (both ends over the 200k-hb budget)
Targets: `ring_square_glue_natTrans` (CREATE+prove) → fold `pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_mate_glue`.

Plan-phase prep (landed cold-green, NOT a prover edit): `fbc-geom-reorder` re-based
`chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison` body to `(chartBaseChangeGeometricComparisonNat ψ φ ρ).app (tilde M)`
(defeq), making the geometric leg of the glue fold SYNTACTIC.

Prover findings (decisive STUCK test fired at BOTH ends):
- **Sentence A — `ring_square_glue_natTrans` STATEMENT is over-budget.** `lemma … : isoWhiskerLeft … ≪≫
  … = … ≪≫ Functor.isoWhiskerRight (chartBaseChangeModuleReassocNat ψ φ ρ) (tilde.functor …) ≪≫ …`
  → `(deterministic) timeout at isDefEq` (metavar) / `whnf` (pinned) @200000hb @L1942 at the
  `isoWhiskerRight (chartBaseChangeModuleReassocNat) (tilde.functor …)` seam (matching the alg-reassoc
  codomain `ModuleCat (extendScalars …)` against `tilde.functor`'s source whnf's the extendScalars/
  ModuleCat diamond). **Decisive measurement:** with `maxHeartbeats 800000` the statement DOES elaborate
  (diagnostic probe, removed) ⇒ over-budget, not ill-typed. `maxHeartbeats` is forbidden ⇒ not committable.
  Preserved as a `/- … -/` comment block (L1911–1970), NOT a typed sorry.
- **Sentence B — the `.app M` fold bombs.** `rw [chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_eq_natApp ψ φ ρ M]; exact
  congrArg (fun i => Iso.app i M) (ring_square_glue_natTrans ψ φ ρ)` → `(deterministic) timeout at whnf`
  @200000hb at the closing `exact` (forces the Iso.app/≪≫ distribution to whnf `pullback (Spec _).obj
  (tilde M)` sheafification carriers). The re-base removed the geom-leg crossing but the **three non-geom
  `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso` legs still cross `.obj (tilde M)`** in the fold. Reverted to a typed `sorry`
  @L2163 with the failed fold preserved in-comment.

Conclusion: this is exactly the iter-024 plan's reversal signal ("a nat-trans-level whnf bomb in the
telescope ⇒ genuine STUCK → iter-025 escalates"). The functor-level `≪≫`-chain route is over-budget at
both the statement and the fold. **iter-025 must escalate STRUCTURALLY, not run another helper round.**
The 5/6 closed scaffold + the geom re-base + `pullbackSpecTildeNatIso`/`_app` + `chartBaseChangeModuleReassoc_eq_natApp`
are all kept for that escalation. Crux `…_ring_square_natural` unchanged (delegates to the glue sorry; no regression).

## SNAP — iter-023 regression FIXED; not a prover lane this iter
Plan-phase `snap-deprivate` de-privatized the 6 consumer-referenced decls (`MonoidalPresheaf`,
`sheafificationCounitIso`, `pshModMonoidal`, `pshModBraided`, `pshModSymmetric`, `Wsheaf`) and cold-built
the CONSUMER (the gate iter-023 skipped). SectionGradedRing.lean is cold-green again (2442 jobs, 5 sorries),
the split preserved. The associator wall `tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs_native` (@L1082) and the other SNAP sorries
are UNTOUCHED. The thrice-failed Option-A `⊗_loc` re-base is staged for iter-025 from this smaller green base.

## Subagent findings (reports in `.archon/logs/iter-024/`)
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker fbc024** (1 must-fix, 0 major, 0 minor): `lem:ring_square_glue_natTrans`
  carried `\leanok` (tex L2725) while its `\lean{...}` target is a commented-out non-decl → FALSE marker +
  no `% NOTE:`. **FIXED by me** (removed `\leanok`, added `% NOTE:`; see manual markers below). The two
  formalized items (`mate_glue` statement `\leanok` + sorry-proof unmarked; `chartBaseChangeGeometricComparison`
  re-base) verified correct + prose-consistent. 11 decls checked.
- **lean-auditor iter024** (14 must-fix / 9 major / 6 minor / 1 excuse): the 14 must-fix are all tracked
  frontier/dead-apparatus sorries (DOWNGRADED per iter-014→023 precedent — known cruxes, no new regression).
  Actionable majors → recs: (1) **two misplaced `set_option maxHeartbeats` clusters** (FlatBaseChange.lean
  L2272, L2307–2310) scope to section doc-comments, NOT to `base_change_mate_gstar_transpose` @L2322 — once
  that sorry is filled it runs UNGUARDED (these live in the dead `base_change_mate_*` apparatus slated for
  excision); (2) duplicate stale module-doc headers in BOTH Picard files post-split; (3) large
  proof-archaeology comment blocks (FBC L2000–2162 ~163L, L1911–1970 ~60L; SNAP ~996–1082, ~1382–1440) +
  stale `iter-NNN` refs in production docstrings. All cleanup, none block downstream.

## Coverage debt (dag-query unmatched)
82 `lean_aux` nodes with no blueprint entry — all pre-existing infra (67 in `Scheme.Modules.*` /
`RelativeTensorCoequalizer.*` SNAP helpers, the rest FBC `*Nat` / `*_concreteApply` / `*_conjugateEquiv`
helpers). **No NEW debt this iter** (the only new Lean was the commented-out `natTrans`, not a compiled
decl). Listed for the planner in recommendations.md as a standing bulk-debt item.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`, `lem:ring_square_glue_natTrans`: **removed `\leanok`** (manual override
  — sync_leanok left a stale `\leanok` on a statement whose `\lean{...}` target is commented-out / non-existent
  in FlatBaseChange.lean L1911–1970; the decl does not compile, so the marker falsely advertised a formalized
  declaration) **and added a `% NOTE:`** documenting the over-budget statement + the iter-025 escalation.

## Notes (LOW)
- FBC `flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso` (~L2648) carries a "deferred to a later iteration" excuse-comment
  on a load-bearing sorry; the sorry itself is already a tracked frontier crux.
- `@[simp] private` lemmas in SectionGradedRingLocalized.lean (`objRestrict*`) — file-local simp set only;
  unusual but file-local, no cross-file reliance.
